title: docs: update README — 2026-07-16
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily README update: Latest News section. (Recent Apps is refreshed by Apps / Update metrics.)

gist.headline: Fresh news in the flowerbed
gist.blurb: The README's Latest News patch got its daily watering. The front page now points wandering bees toward the newest happenings.
gist.summary: Refreshed the README's Latest News section for July 16, 2026, keeping the project homepage current with recent pollinations.ai updates.
gist.impact: Visitors and contributors get a more current snapshot of what is happening across the open-source hive.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy open-source garden noticeboard represents the refreshed README news section: Polly, wearing tiny editor glasses, pins a fresh pixel-paper update onto a retro terminal-shaped bulletin board while small code-plants and flowers grow around it.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink blush, light blue wings, and tiny editor glasses, pinning a fresh news note onto a retro CRT terminal bulletin board in a blooming code garden. The board glows prominently lime green (#ecf874) and reads "LATEST NEWS" in simple dark purple (#110518) pixel text, with warm cream, mint, lavender, and peach pastel gradients, soft lighting, subtle scanlines, cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes.
